name: @unite-group/ui
description: Shared UI primitives (shadcn New York template, React 19, Tailwind 4) consuming @unite-group/brand-config tokens via themeFactory. Seed: Button, Card, Dialog, Form.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/button.tsx src/card.tsx src/dialog.tsx src/form.tsx src/label.tsx src/utils.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --clean --external react --external react-dom --external @radix-ui/react-slot --external @radix-ui/react-dialog --external @radix-ui/react-label --external react-hook-form --external lucide-react
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/button.tsx src/card.tsx src/dialog.tsx src/form.tsx src/label.tsx src/utils.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch --external react --external react-dom
